##  About SCALINQ
#  About SCALINQ
Our interdisciplinary team forms the core of SCALINQ. We consist of leading researchers with competencies ranging from quantum engineering, microwave engineering, and hardware design. Our research-based solutions are derived from years of research and development at Chalmers University of Technology, Sweden. 
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/saas-v3-popup.png)
![Scalinq Team](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/8-scaled.jpg)
## Good Solutions Can’t Be Developed Behind Closed Doors
  * Research institutes and companies within the industry are innovating to overcome the hurdles in scaling the number of qubits and many are developing novel solutions along the way. However, the lead time between identifying a bottleneck and proposing a solution can take years.  
  
We at SCALINQ are on a mission to change that. We have identified a clear lack of viable products for the broader market and are here to commercialize solutions which would help accelerate the development of quantum devices, regardless of size.  
  
Learn more about our team, founders, and advisors.


![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/cropped-Scale-qubit-2-300x300.png)
### Focus on core activities
Our goal is to help the industry with developing the core solutions needed to realize quantum computers in the near future.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/cropped-Collaborate.png)
### Promote collaborations
Through our development of solutions, we encourage and adopt a collaborative approach. The industry is in great need of globally-shared solutions.

##  Good Solutions Can’t Be Developed Behind Closed Doors
At SCALINQ, our team is at the heart of everything we do. Bringing together experts in quantum engineering, microwave technology, and hardware design, we develop high-performance hardware solutions that enable the scaling of quantum computers. Deeply rooted in research, our products include advanced RF packaging, high-density interconnects, and cryogenic components designed to meet the demands of quantum computing.
With deep roots at Chalmers University of Technology, Sweden, we blend global and local scientific expertise with Gothenburg’s practical and collaborative work ethic—where innovation and determination drive progress.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ScalinQ-Offices-V1-00659-square.jpg)
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/wave_opt.webp)
## Our Story
Since our foundation, we have remained true to our mission and commitment to help realize quantum computing. SCALINQ is built on the foundation that re-inventing the wheel behind closed doors is the enemy of progress, and we are committed to nurturing a collaborative research approach to tackling the fundamental engineering challenges in our field.   
  
The backbone of SCALINQ is a multidisciplinary team that brings together some of the greatest and most curious minds. We are proud to be a team of various backgrounds and cultures, brought together by our shared hunger for exploration. An attitude we like to sum up with two questions: 
“Why is it done that way? Can we do it this way?”
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ScalinQ-Offices-V1-00982.jpg)
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ScalinQ-Offices-V1-00633.jpg)
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ScalinQ-Offices-V1-00921-1024x682.jpg)
## Let's bridge the gap
## Together We Are Challenging the Status Quo in Quantum Development
The quantum industry is constantly evolving to scale the number of qubits, but overcoming technical bottlenecks often takes years. While many research institutes and companies develop innovative solutions, there is a clear gap in commercially available products that accelerate progress.
At SCALINQ, we bridge that gap. By transforming cutting-edge research into scalable, market-ready solutions, we help our partners and customers speed up the development of quantum devices—no matter their size. We believe that questions are meant to be asked and that every challenge is an opportunity to innovate. By asking, _“Why is it done that way? Can we do it this way instead?”_ , we drive meaningful progress in quantum technology.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ScalinQ-Offices-V1-00834-1024x682.jpg)
## Partnering for progress
We actively collaborate with research institutes, quantum developers, and industry partners to ensure our solutions meet real-world needs. By working closely with our customers, we create products that remove barriers and accelerate breakthroughs.
Join us in shaping the future of quantum computing. Reach out to explore how we can collaborate.
[ Collaborate with us ](https://www.scalinq.com/contact/)

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-c1843f0 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="c1843f0" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">The quantum industry is constantly evolving to scale the number of qubits, but overcoming technical bottlenecks often takes years.
